blocks.text: Carlsen hunts Candidates glory while Flanders cobbles await seven Norwegians

Sunday delivers a rare multi-sport Norwegian festival: seven riders chase Monument glory at Flanders, Magnus Carlsen enters Round 7 with World Championship qualification on the line, and Suzuka hosts an early F1 title skirmish.
♟️ Carlsen — Round 7, FIDE Candidates Tournament 2026. Three from three in recent news. 14:30
🎮 PGL CS2 Major Bucharest — rain (Håvard Nygaard) chases the biggest title in CS2. 02:00 Mon
